title: MAM Original Soothers | 0-6 Months | 2 Pack | Comes in Dummy Steriliser Case | Sustainable Materials | Baby Accessories for Newborn | Cream/Green (Various Designs)
features: Feels familiar for baby: MAM soothers feature SkinSoft Silicone, accepted by 94%* of babies for its soft, skin-like feel that mimics the comfort of mum’s touch
Easy to hold: Babies can easily grasp the MAM soother via the handy button. It also allows the soother to be firmly attached to a soother strap
Supports healthy teeth: Designed with dental experts, the thin, symmetrical teat promotes healthy tooth development, making it ideal for growing smiles
Made for busy parents: Comes with a self-sterilising travel case, so you can clean the soothers in the microwave quickly and easily, even when you're on the go
UK’s favourite: MAM is the UK’s #1 bottle & soother brand* (*Baby Accessories & Feeding, 52 weeks ending 25/01/2025, GB Total Retail Market, Nielsen Consumer LLC 2025)
description: MAM Original Soother (Pack of 2) 2-6 Months - Soother with jaw-friendly teat made from safe and sustainable materials MAM Original soothers are the ideal choice for any little trendsetters in the making! Each soother has a MAM SkinSoft silicone teat, accepted by 94 Percent* of babies, and has been designed in close cooperation with paediatricians, dentists, and orthodontists. The silicone also prevents slipping, keeping the soother in the baby's mouth. The symmetrically shaped teat ensures that your newborn's jaw is always in the correct position, nurturing a healthy jaw and teeth development. MAM Original soothers come with a self sterilising travel case for easy sterilising in the microwave in only three minutes! MAM soothers are carefully tailored to precise age groups. These soothers are for babies 2-6 months - look out for other MAM 2-6 months soothers, as well as MAM wider range of baby products, covering everything from MAM Bottles to the MAM Starter Set. Product benefits: Silicone teat with SkinSoft technology BPS/BPA Free and 100% baby-safe material Travel case can be sterilised in a microwave Designed with medical experts Contains 2 MAM Soothers and 1 travel case Colour: Cream (Designs May Vary) *Market research 2010-2023, tested with 1,588 babies.
